task_objective: Implement docs/plans/shortcut_management.md using docs/specs/ludusavi_shortcut_management.md so the Ludusavi launcher uses one visible non-Steam shortcut named Ludusavi.
tests_added: tests/test_shortcut_artwork_static.py visible shortcut identity, no hidden shortcut APIs, name-first cache flow, and logging assertions
tests/test_readme.py visible Ludusavi shortcut documentation assertion
design_decisions: Used a single SHORTCUT_NAME constant with value Ludusavi and removed separate launcher/running names.
Resolved shortcuts by exact name before cache lookup, updating the backend cache when the named shortcut differs from the saved AppID.
Kept the backend shortcut AppID RPCs unchanged as the cache source of truth.
Removed all frontend hide calls and hidden shortcut ambient API declarations.
All resolved shortcuts are prepared for launch with the current command, compatibility tool, and bundled artwork before RunGame.
results: Focused red tests failed before implementation, then passed after the launcher refactor. Full Python, TypeScript, frontend supply-chain, build, and package checks passed; pnpm audit required network escalation after sandbox DNS failed.
